title: Retention and safekeeping of official passports - Canada.ca
content:
## Retention and safekeeping of official passports
This section contains information for representatives of the Government of Canada and people travelling on Government of Canada business.
A Canadian passport remains the property of the Government of Canada at all times.
You must return the diplomatic or special passport to the Passport Program Official Travel office immediately
- after completing your travel on the official business trip
- if you change departments
- when the passport expires, or
- if requested to do so by the Passport Program
The official passport will be held in safekeeping until it is needed for your next official travel.
Exception: Personnel of departments or agencies that have entered into a memorandum of understanding with the Passport Program, Official Travel, for the safekeeping of official passports.

## How to return your official passport
Return your official passport either in person, by courier, by messenger or by mail .
The only exception is for personnel of departments or agencies that have entered into a memorandum of understanding with the Passport Program, Official Travel, for the safekeeping of official passports.
The departments and agencies that have ratified a memorandum of understanding are:
- Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada
- Bank of Canada—Senior Deputy Governor
- Canada Border Services Agency
- Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission
- Canadian Security Intelligence Service
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
- Fisheries and Oceans
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
- National Defence—select units
- National Research Council
- Natural Resources Canada—Deputy Minister's Office
- Public Health Agency of Canada (Winnipeg)
- Public Service Commission
- Royal Canadian Mounted Police
- Supreme Court of Canada
- Treasury Board Secretariat
To find out more about entering into a memorandum of understanding for the safekeeping of official passports, please email us .

## How to get your official passport for an upcoming trip
If the passport is still valid, and the validity period is enough to cover the length of your trip, write a request to the Passport Program Official Travel to get your passport by email or by fax .

## Global Affairs Canada clients – diplomatic passports only
Global Affairs Canada personnel must sign and submit the Agreement regarding continued custody of diplomatic passports [PPTC 446] ( PDF , 50.21 KB ) to keep their diplomatic passport.
